notes: 0.6.28 keeps the 0.6.27 core-player sync and lag baseline, but makes CUA focus/nav capture behave better in VR: thumbstick-click grab navigation always unlocks movement, gaze focus waits until movement stops, trigger tap toggles play or pause on release when no joystick navigation was used, and the runtime now exposes a transient active-screen readback seam for future indicators.
